description: 电量监听与低电量事件

success_signals.pattern: 24Already triggered within the hour; no need to monitor again.
24Already triggered within the hour; time since last trigger : .*Hours, still waiting : .*hour
Battery level is below the threshold, but it has already been triggered within the last 24 hours; skipping this trigger.

failure_signals.pattern: Battery level changed, but the task does not exist.
Power level changed, but the task does not exist.
scene: battery_event - ThingAudioRecordManagerInterface nil, skip battery notification

lifecycle_signals.pattern: scene: battery_event - Start listening to power events.
scene: battery_event - Stop listening to battery events
Start monitoring battery level; current battery level : .*%%, Threshold : .*%%
Battery level is below the threshold at startup. : .*%%，Trigger after battery level changes

noise_patterns: scene: battery_event - Manually trigger low-battery event (
scene: battery_event - Received battery level crossing thre
Reset pass-through status and timestamp records
More than 24 hours since the last trigger : %.1fHours, can
User login and reload the timestamp of the last battery lev
User logs out and clears the timestamp from memory.
